image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Your DNA sequence isn’t the whole story.
Context visual: Chemical switches called epigenetics decide what genes actually do.
Escalation visual: Think of methylation and histone marks as tiny on/off switches for your genes.
Evidence visual: Your environment can influence these switches, changing gene expression without altering DNA.
Payoff visual: But remember, inherited traits through epigenetics are still being studied.
Cta visual: Curious about how your genes can be influenced? Follow for more scientific insights!
